title: lithocarpus longicaudatus
intro: Lithocarpus longicaudatus, also known as the Himalayan Lithocarpus or Himalayan Stone Pine, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Himalayan region. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus longicaudatus include the ability to treat respiratory issues, fever, and digestive problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Lithocarpus longicaudatus include teas, infusions, and decoctions made from its leaves, bark, and roots, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
